questions.objective_ref: Define output validation and explain in plain language why AI responses cannot be assumed to follow a format.
Identify the format rules in a Rubric role that become the checklist for a validator.
Write a Python function that checks an AI response against at least two format constraints and returns True or False.
Interpret the result of a validation check and describe what the result means for the next step.
Recognise at least three common mistakes beginners make when writing validators.
Recognise at least three common mistakes beginners make when writing validators — vocabulary: validation error term (corpus §5c).
